title: rubus corylifolius var. hoyoqueseranus

side_effects: Rubus corylifolius var. hoyoqueseranus can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, nausea, and dizziness due to its high levels of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds.
